purpose: Detect an approved requirement change that has no documented impact analysis.

requiredFindings.supportingChecklist: Approved change records must include an impact analysis.
requiredFindings.supportingComment: The impact analysis document is still pending.

notes: Verification Impact is present, so the safety-related checklist item is not expected to fail.
Cause of Change provides context but the required finding is based on approval, empty impact analysis and checklist evidence.
